title: Matilda's Grooming Review
text:
## Grooming Review

Client: Matilda, dark red golden retriever

**Bath quality:** {adjective}, with notes of {food} and wet {animal}.

**Brush report:** Removed {number} pounds of {color} fluff, one mystery {object}, and several {plural noun} from behind her {body part}.

**Cooperation:** Matilda {past-tense verb} until the dryer began {verb ending in -ing} like a {sound}.

**Post-groom mood:** {emotion}; immediately tried to {verb} on the {place}.

**Final rating:** {number} stars and one {adjective} bandana.
